modules.title: The Strategist OS
modules.subtitle: Zhuge Liang × Elite CEO × You
modules.source_excerpt:
# THE STRATEGIST OS
*(Zhuge Liang × Elite CEO × You)*
This is how great minds think when they work with intelligence—human or AI.
body: This is how great minds think when they work with intelligence—human or AI.
modules.reflection_prompt: What outcome are you steering toward today?

modules.title: Clarity of intent
modules.subtitle: Yi → 意
modules.source_excerpt: FIRST PRINCIPLE: CLARITY OF INTENT — training checklist and strategist vs vague asks.
body: If Zhuge Liang sat with you, he would not start solving.
They ask AI vague questions. A strategist asks with outcome, skills, constraints, and time.
Specific intent compresses infinite possibilities into actionable strategy.
This alone puts you in the top 5%.

quotes.text: What is the outcome you seek… precisely?

weak_strong_examples.weak: "Help me build a business" / "Give me ideas"
weak_strong_examples.strong: "Design a system that generates $10k/month within 6 months using my current skills: X, constraints: Y, and available time: Z."

modules.reflection_prompt: Before your next ask: outcome, horizon, constraints, metric — write them in one line.

modules.title: Structured thinking
modules.subtitle: Li → 理
body: This is where CEOs and strategists dominate.
They don’t think in chaos. They think in models.
When you ask AI like this, it becomes a strategist, not a search engine.

layers.title: Levers
bullets: What variables actually move the outcome?

layers.title: Strategy
bullets: What sequence of actions changes those variables?

examples.label: Strategist
examples.content:
System: content → distribution → retention → monetization
Levers: CTR, watch time, posting frequency
Strategy: test thumbnails → increase retention → scale winners

modules.reflection_prompt: Name system, levers, and one strategy sequence for your current problem.

modules.title: Elite questioning
modules.subtitle: Bridge to intelligence
modules.source_excerpt: Elon / Bezos pattern + 5 Elite Question Types.
body: This is the bridge between you and intelligence.
They don’t ask: “What should I do?”
This is how you extract intelligence, not just receive answers.

quotes.text: Where does this break at scale?

question_types.title: First principles
question_types.quote: Break this down to fundamental truths.

question_types.title: Blind spots
question_types.quote: What am I not seeing that could destroy this plan?

question_types.title: Lever identification
question_types.quote: What 20% of actions drive 80% of results here?

question_types.title: Optimization
question_types.quote: How do we make this 10x more effective?

question_types.title: Strategic path
question_types.quote: What is the most efficient sequence of moves from A → B?

modules.reflection_prompt: Which one question would change your next decision most?

modules.title: The Zhuge Liang layer
modules.subtitle: Mindset
modules.source_excerpt: Core traits, key shift, depth + timing.
body: This is what makes everything above work.
AI gives you speed. Zhuge Liang gives you depth + timing.

quotes.text:
Don't rush to answers.
Sit with the problem longer than others.

modules.reflection_prompt: What problem deserves five more minutes before you answer?

modules.title: The convergence
modules.subtitle: Your new thinking flow
body: Now combine everything.
This loop = Strategist OS

loop_steps.title: DEFINE (Yi)
bullets: What exactly am I trying to achieve?

loop_steps.title: MODEL (Li)
bullets: What system am I operating in?

loop_steps.title: REFLECT
loop_steps.subtitle: Zhuge Liang Mind
bullets: Did this move us closer to the outcome?

modules.reflection_prompt: Run the five steps on one real situation today.

modules.title: How you talk to AI
modules.subtitle: From now on
body: Here's how YOU should sound:
That is how a CEO talks to intelligence.

comparisons.strong:
"I want to build a $5k/month income stream within 4 months.
Constraints: part-time, current skills in X, starting capital $Y.

Break this into:

1. System map
2. Key leverage points
3. Highest probability strategy
4. Risks and failure points
5. Step-by-step execution plan

Then optimize it for speed and simplicity."

modules.reflection_prompt: Rewrite your last vague ask into a strategist-level prompt.

modules.title: Your evolution
modules.subtitle: Where you are heading
modules.source_excerpt: Final teaching + User → Architect + direct intelligence.
body: Because: AI can generate 100 plans. Only a strategist can choose the right one.
You are moving from: User → Operator → Strategist → Architect

Optional next steps from the source: a daily strategist training system; AI prompt templates for every domain (business, health, learning); or simulated CEO-level decision scenarios for practice — turning insight into power.

quotes.text:
You seek a great strategist beside you.
But the true question is—
can you recognize a good strategy when you see it?

You don't use AI anymore.

You direct intelligence.

modules.reflection_prompt: Which rung are you on today—and what one habit moves you up?
